title: Define domain order errors
scenario: Domain errors should name business-rule failures without mentioning databases, HTTP, or UI details.
instructions: Define CreateOrderError with EmptyOrder and InvalidQuantity variants.

hints.body: Define a public CreateOrderError enum with EmptyOrder and InvalidQuantity variants.
Derive Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, and Eq so later lessons can compare and wrap these small value errors.
One complete solution for Define domain order errors is shown below.

completionExplanation: CreateOrderError now names domain rule failures without pulling in repository or HTTP concepts.
